name: Boom
short_description: Boom is a logic puzzle game with a relaxing atmosphere, which builds clear links,An exciting new twist on a classic game without the element of guesswork!
detailed_description: Boom is a logic puzzle game with a relaxing atmosphere. Players can place props with different effects to make these props have an effect that detonates a single bomb and then produces a continuous explosion. Use this effect to clear the target in the level and constantly challenge yourself Logical thinking!
about_the_game: Boom is a logic puzzle game with a relaxing atmosphere. Players can place props with different effects to make these props have an effect that detonates a single bomb and then produces a continuous explosion. Use this effect to clear the target in the level and constantly challenge yourself Logical thinking!
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Traditional Chinese*, Danish*, Ukrainian*, Russian*, Bulgarian*, Hungarian*, Turkish*, Greek*, Norwegian*, Czech*, Japanese*, Polish*, Thai*, Swedish*, Simplified Chinese*, Romanian*, Finnish*, Dutch*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Spanish - Latin America*, Vietnamese*, Arabic*, Korean*
